Title: Verify User Registration
Preconditions: None
Test Data:

- Password: testpassword
- Email: test@example.com
- Nome: John

2. Verify that all attributes are correctly set.
Expected Result: All attributes should be set correctly.

Title: Verify User Update Email
Preconditions: User is registered with an email.
Test Data: New email: newemail@example.com
Test Steps:

2. Verify that the email attribute is updated.
Expected Result: The email attribute should be updated to the new value.
